session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant: Now let me create the CI-only consolidation skill. Let me check how the one-shot-plan command works in CI for reference:
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→description: Create a plan from a one-shot prompt, save it as a draft PR, and write results to .erk/impl-context/ (used by CI workflow) 3→--- 4→ 5→# One-Shot Plan 6→ 7→You are running autonomously in a CI workflow. Your job is to read a prompt, explore the codebase, create a detailed implementation plan, and save it as a draft PR. 8→ 9→**Important:** You are ONLY planning, not implementing. The plan must be self-contained — a separate Claude session will implement it with no access to your exploration context. 10→ 11→## Step 1: Read the Prompt 12→ 13→Read `.erk/impl-context/prompt.md` to understand what you need to do. 14→ 15→## Step 2: Read Objective Context (if present) 16→ 17→If the `$OBJECTIVE_ISSUE` environment variable is set (non-empty), this plan is for a specific node of an objective. Use `erk exec check-objective $OBJECTIVE_ISSUE` to fetch the full objective context (title, roadmap, progress). The `$NODE_ID` environment variable contains the specific roadmap node ID being planned. Incorporate the objective context into your planning — understand the broader goal and how this node fits into it. 18→ 19→## Step 3: Load Context 20→ 21→Read `AGENTS.md` to understand the project conventions. Follow its documentation-first discovery process: scan `docs/learned/index.md`, grep `docs/learned/` for relevant docs, and load skills as directed by AGENTS.md routing rules. 22→ 23→## Step 4: Explore the Codebase 24→ 25→Use Explore agents and Grep/Glob to understand the relevant areas of the codebase: 26→ 27→- Search for files, patterns, and existing implementations related to the prompt 28→- Identify which files need to be created or modified 29→- Understand existing architecture and patterns 30→- Find relevant tests and test patterns
... [72 lines omitted] ...
60→Parse the JSON output. If `success` is not `true`, stop and report the error. Otherwise, use `$PLAN_ISSUE_NUMBER` as the `plan_number`. To get the `title`, extract the first `# ` heading from `.erk/impl-context/plan.md`. 78→Parse the JSON output. If `success` is not `true`, stop and report the error. Otherwise, extract `plan_number` and `title` from the output.
session.assistant: Now let me also look at the replan command to understand how it works:
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→description: Replan an existing plan against current codebase state 3→argument-hint: <plan-number-or-url> 4→--- 5→ 6→# /erk:replan 7→ 8→Recomputes existing plan(s) against the current codebase state, creating a new plan and closing the original(s). 9→ 10→Supports consolidating multiple plans into a single unified plan. 11→ 12→## Usage 13→ 14→```bash 15→/erk:replan 2521 # Single plan replan 16→/erk:replan https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/2521 17→/erk:replan 123 456 789 # Consolidate multiple plans 18→``` 19→ 20→--- 21→ 22→## Agent Instructions 23→ 24→### Step 1: Parse Plan References 25→ 26→Split `$ARGUMENTS` on whitespace. For each argument: 27→ 28→- If numeric (e.g., `2521`), use directly as plan number 29→- If URL (e.g., `https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/2521`), extract the number from the path 30→
... [25 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Dispatch logic for consolidate-learn-plans workflow via RemoteGitHub REST API. 2→ 3→Creates a branch, draft PR, and dispatches the consolidate-learn-plans workflow 4→entirely via the GitHub REST API. 249→ except HttpError as e: 251→ click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + f"Failed to post queued comment: {e}" 256→ except Exception as exc: 257→ user_output(click.style(f"Failed during: {current_step}", fg="red"))

1→"""Dispatch GitHub Actions workflows via unified interface. 2→ 3→Usage examples: 4→ erk launch pr-address --pr 456 5→ erk launch pr-rebase --pr 456 6→ erk launch pr-rebase --pr 456 --no-squash 7→ erk launch plan-implement --issue 789 8→ erk launch learn --issue 789 9→ erk launch one-shot --pr 456 --prompt "fix the auth bug" 10→ erk launch one-shot --pr 456 -f prompt.md 11→ erk launch consolidate-learn-plans 12→""" 13→ 14→from pathlib import Path 15→ 16→import click 17→ 18→from erk.cli.commands.consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch import ( 19→ dispatch_consolidate_learn_plans, 20→) 21→from erk.cli.commands.pr.metadata_helpers import maybe_update_plan_dispatch_metadata 22→from erk.cli.commands.ref_resolution import resolve_dispatch_ref 23→from erk.cli.constants import WORKFLOW_COMMAND_MAP 24→from erk.cli.ensure import Ensure, UserFacingCliError 25→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 26→from erk.core.repo_discovery import NoRepoSentinel, RepoContext 27→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRNotFound 28→from erk_shared.gateway.remote_github.abc import RemoteGitHub 29→from erk_shared.gateway.remote_github.real import RealRemoteGitHub 30→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9030: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9030**
### Changes Made
1. **`src/erk/cli/constants.py`** — Added `CONSOLIDATE_LEARN_PLANS_WORKFLOW_NAME` constant and `"consolidate-learn-plans"` entry to `WORKFLOW_COMMAND_MAP`
2. **`src/erk/cli/commands/consolidate_learn_plans_dispatch.py`** (new) — Dispatch logic following the one-shot pattern: creates branch (`consolidate-learn-plans-{MM-DD-HHMM}`), commits static prompt, creates draft PR with `erk-pr`/`erk-plan`/`erk-learn` labels, dispatches workflow
3. **`src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py`** — Added `_get_remote_github()` helper, `_dispatch_consolidate_learn_plans()` handler, routing for `consolidate-learn-plans` workflow, updated docstring
4. **`tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py`** (new) — 6 tests: happy path, model passthrough, dry-run, explicit ref, branch naming format, no-model-when-none
5. **`.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans.md`** (new) — Interactive skill (renamed from `local/replan-learn-plans.md`) with user confirmation via AskUserQuestion
6. **`.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans-plan.md`** (new) — Non-interactive CI skill for autonomous consolidation: queries plans, investigates codebase, writes implementation plan, closes originals
7. **`.github/workflows/consolidate-learn-plans.yml`** (new) — 5-job pipeline: consolidate → close-empty-pr | implement → ci-address → rebase-if-needed
8. **Deleted** `.claude/commands/local/replan-learn-plans.md`
